prompt: Create a luxurious six bedroom four bathroom house that is on the beach with all the amenities
svgContent:
<svg width="100%" height="100%" viewBox="0 0 800 600" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
    <!-- Title Block -->
    <rect x="650" y="500" width="140" height="80" fill="#f7fafc" stroke="#2d3748"/>
    <text x="660" y="520" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="#1a202c">Project: Luxurious Beach House</text>
    <text x="660" y="535" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="#1a202c">Date: October 2023</text>
    
    <!-- North Arrow -->
    <polygon points="775,50 785,30 795,50" fill="#1a202c"/>
    <line x1="785" y1="30" x2="785" y2="60" stroke="#1a202c" stroke-width="2"/>
    <text x="778" y="70" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="#1a202c">N</text>

    <!-- Outer Walls -->
    <rect x="50" y="50" width="700" height="450" fill="#f7fafc" stroke="#2d3748" stroke-width="8"/>

    <!-- Rooms and Doors -->
    <!-- Living Room -->
    <rect x="60" y="60" width="280" height="180" fill="none" stroke="#2d3748" stroke-width="3"/>
    <text x="150" y="160" font-family="Arial" font-size="14" fill="#1a202c">Living Room</text>
    <path d="M160,60 A20,20 0 0,1 180,80" fill="none" stroke="#2d3748" stroke-width="3"/>

    <!-- Kitchen -->
    <rect x="350" y="60" width="200" height="180" fill="none" stroke="#2d3748" stroke-width="3"/>
    <text x="420" y="160" font-family="Arial" font-size="14" fill="#1a202c">Kitchen</text>
    <path d="M350,180 A20,20 0 0,1 370,200" fill="none" stroke="#2d3748" stroke-width="3"/>

    <!-- Dining Room -->
    <rect x="560" y="60" width="180" height="180" fill="none" stroke="#2d3748" stroke-width="3"/>
    <text x="620" y="160" font-family="Arial" font-size="14" fill="#1a202c">Dining Room</text>
    <path d="M740,100 A20,20 0 0,1 760,120" fill="none" stroke="#2d3748" stroke-width="3"/>

    <!-- Bedrooms (6) -->
    <!-- Bedroom 1 -->
    <rect x="60" y="250" width="200" height="120" fill="none" stroke="#2d3748" stroke-width="3"/>
    <text x="120" y="320" font-family="Arial" font-size="14" fill="#1a202c">Bedroom 1</text>
    <path d="M60,310 A20,20 0 0,1 80,330" fill="none" stroke="#2d3748" stroke-width="3"/>
    
    <!-- Bedroom 2 -->
    <rect x="270" y="250" width="200" height="120" fill="none" stroke="#2d3748" stroke-width="3"/>
    <text x="330" y="320" font-family="Arial" font-size="14" fill="#1a202c">Bedroom 2</text>
    <path d="M470,250 A20,20 0 0,1 490,270" fill="none" stroke="#2d3748" stroke-width="3"/>

    <!-- Bedroom 3 -->
    <rect x="480" y="250" width="260" height="120" fill="none" stroke="#2d3748" stroke-width="3"/>
    <text x="580" y="320" font-family="Arial" font-size="14" fill="#1a202c">Bedroom 3</text>
    <path d="M740,370 A20,20 0 0,1 760,390" fill="none" stroke="#2d3748" stroke-width="3"/>

    <!-- Bedroom 4 -->
    <rect x="60" y="380" width="200" height="120" fill="none" stroke="#2d3748" stroke-width="3"/>
    <text x="120" y="450" font-family="Arial" font-size="14" fill="#1a202c">Bedroom 4</text>
    <path d="M60,490 A20,20 0 0,1 80,510" fill="none" stroke="#2d3748" stroke-width="3"/>

    <!-- Bedroom 5 -->
    <rect x="270" y="380" width="200" height="120" fill="none" stroke="#2d3748" stroke-width="3"/>
    <text x="330" y="450" font-family="Arial" font-size="14" fill="#1a202c">Bedroom 5</text>
    <path d="M470,440 A20,20 0 0,1 490,460" fill="none" stroke="#2d3748" stroke-width="3"/>

    <!-- Bedroom 6 -->
    <rect x="480" y="380" width="260" height="120" fill="none" stroke="#2d3748" stroke-width="3"/>
    <text x="580" y="450" font-family="Arial" font-size="14" fill="#1a202c">Bedroom 6</text>
    <path d="M740,490 A20,20 0 0,1 760,510" fill="none" stroke="#2d3748" stroke-width="3"/>

    <!-- Bathrooms (4) -->
    <!-- Bathroom 1 -->
    <rect x="60" y="510" width="120" height="80" fill="none" stroke="#2d3748" stroke-width="3"/>
    <text x="80" y="560" font-family="Arial" font-size="14" fill="#1a202c">Bathroom 1</text>
    
    <!-- Bathroom 2 -->
    <rect x="190" y="510" width="120" height="80" fill="none" stroke="#2d3748" stroke-width="3"/>
    <text x="210" y="560" font-family="Arial" font-size="14" fill="#1a202c">Bathroom 2</text>
    
    <!-- Bathroom 3 -->
    <rect x="320" y="510" width="120" height="80" fill="none" stroke="#2d3748" stroke-width="3"/>
    <text x="340" y="560" font-family="Arial" font-size="14" fill="#1a202c">Bathroom 3</text>
    
    <!-- Bathroom 4 -->
    <rect x="450" y="510" width="120" height="80" fill="none" stroke="#2d3748" stroke-width="3"/>
    <text x="470" y="560" font-family="Arial" font-size="14" fill="#1a202c">Bathroom 4</text>

    <!-- Basic Furniture Layout -->
    <!-- Living Room Furniture -->
    <rect x="100" y="100" width="60" height="40" fill="#a0aec0" stroke="#2d3748"/>
    <text x="100" y="120" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="#1a202c">Sofa</text>
    <rect x="200" y="100" width="40" height="40" fill="#a0aec0" stroke="#2d3748"/>
    <text x="200" y="120" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="#1a202c">Table</text>

    <!-- Kitchen Furniture -->
    <rect x="380" y="100" width="80" height="40" fill="#a0aec0" stroke="#2d3748"/>
    <text x="380" y="120" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="#1a202c">Island</text>
    <rect x="440" y="160" width="60" height="40" fill="#a0aec0" stroke="#2d3748"/>
    <text x="440" y="180" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="#1a202c">Stove</text>

    <!-- Dining Room Furniture -->
    <rect x="600" y="120" width="80" height="60" fill="#a0aec0" stroke="#2d3748"/>
    <text x="610" y="150" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="#1a202c">Dining Table</text>

</svg>
description: AI-generated floor_plan for: Create a luxurious six bedroom four bathroom house that is on the beach with all the amenities

prompt: Create create a 10,000 square-foot home that is three levels two masters one on level two one on level three the first level should be about 9 feet to 10 feet tall make it have a total of 20 rooms including bathrooms and closets side-by-side kitchen one professional and one for entertaining make sure there's a bar make sure the backyard area where the pool is is above sea level so it doesn't get hit with any storm damage make it a coastal house near the water
svgContent:
<svg width="100%" height="100%" viewBox="0 0 800 600" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
  <!-- Title Block -->
  <rect x="630" y="540" width="160" height="60" fill="#f7fafc" stroke="#2d3748"/>
  <text x="640" y="560" font-family="Arial" font-size="12" fill="#1a202c">Project: Coastal Home</text>
  <text x="640" y="580" font-family="Arial" font-size="12" fill="#1a202c">Date: Oct 2023</text>
  
  <!-- North Arrow -->
  <polygon points="750,30 740,50 760,50" fill="#1a202c"/>
  <text x="745" y="70" font-family="Arial" font-size="12" fill="#1a202c">N</text>
  
  <!-- First Level -->
  <rect x="50" y="50" width="700" height="400" fill="#f7fafc" stroke="#2d3748" stroke-width="5"/>
  <text x="60" y="70" font-family="Arial" font-size="14" fill="#1a202c">Level 1</text>
  
  <!-- Rooms -->
  <rect x="60" y="100" width="230" height="150" fill="#f7fafc" stroke="#2d3748" stroke-width="3"/>
  <text x="70" y="120" font-family="Arial" font-size="12" fill="#1a202c">Living Room</text>
  
  <rect x="300" y="100" width="200" height="150" fill="#f7fafc" stroke="#2d3748" stroke-width="3"/>
  <text x="310" y="120" font-family="Arial" font-size="12" fill="#1a202c">Kitchen (Pro)</text>
  
  <rect x="510" y="100" width="230" height="150" fill="#f7fafc" stroke="#2d3748" stroke-width="3"/>
  <text x="520" y="120" font-family="Arial" font-size="12" fill="#1a202c">Kitchen (Entertain)</text>
  
  <rect x="60" y="260" width="100" height="90" fill="#f7fafc" stroke="#2d3748" stroke-width="3"/>
  <text x="70" y="280" font-family="Arial" font-size="12" fill="#1a202c">Dining</text>
  
  <rect x="170" y="260" width="100" height="90" fill="#f7fafc" stroke="#2d3748" stroke-width="3"/>
  <text x="180" y="280" font-family="Arial" font-size="12" fill="#1a202c">Office</text>
  
  <rect x="280" y="260" width="100" height="90" fill="#f7fafc" stroke="#2d3748" stroke-width="3"/>
  <text x="290" y="280" font-family="Arial" font-size="12" fill="#1a202c">Studio</text>
  
  <!-- Bar -->
  <rect x="390" y="260" width="100" height="90" fill="#f7fafc" stroke="#2d3748" stroke-width="3"/>
  <text x="400" y="280" font-family="Arial" font-size="12" fill="#1a202c">Bar</text>
  
  <!-- Pool Area (Backyard) -->
  <rect x="620" y="260" width="110" height="90" fill="#f7fafc" stroke="#2d3748" stroke-width="3"/>
  <text x="630" y="280" font-family="Arial" font-size="12" fill="#1a202c">Pool Area</text>

  <!-- Doors -->
  <path d="M60 250 A10 10 0 0 1 70 260" fill="none" stroke="#2d3748" stroke-width="3"/>
  <path d="M300 250 A10 10 0 0 1 310 260" fill="none" stroke="#2d3748" stroke-width="3"/>
  <path d="M510 250 A10 10 0 0 1 520 260" fill="none" stroke="#2d3748" stroke-width="3"/>

  <!-- Second Level -->
  <rect x="50" y="460" width="700" height="50" fill="#f7fafc" stroke="#2d3748" stroke-width="5"/>
  <text x="60" y="480" font-family="Arial" font-size="14" fill="#1a202c">Level 2 - Master Suite</text>

  <!-- Third Level -->
  <rect x="50" y="520" width="700" height="50" fill="#f7fafc" stroke="#2d3748" stroke-width="5"/>
  <text x="60" y="540" font-family="Arial" font-size="14" fill="#1a202c">Level 3 - Master Suite</text>
</svg>
description: AI-generated floor_plan for: Create create a 10,000 square-foot home that is three levels two masters one on level two one on level three the first level should be about 9 feet to 10 feet tall make it have a total of 20 rooms including bathrooms and closets side-by-side kitchen one professional and one for entertaining make sure there's a bar make sure the backyard area where the pool is is above sea level so it doesn't get hit with any storm damage make it a coastal house near the water

prompt: Create create a 10,000 square-foot home that is three levels two masters one on level two one on level three the first level should be about 9 feet to 10 feet tall make it have a total of 20 rooms including bathrooms and closets side-by-side kitchen one professional and one for entertaining make sure there's a bar make sure the backyard area where the pool is is above sea level so it doesn't get hit with any storm damage make it a coastal house near the water
svgContent:
<svg viewBox="0 0 800 600" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
  <!-- Title Block -->
  <rect x="600" y="500" width="200" height="100" fill="#f7fafc" stroke="#2d3748" />
  <text x="610" y="520" font-family="Arial" font-size="12" fill="#1a202c">Project Name: Coastal Dream Home</text>
  <text x="610" y="540" font-family="Arial" font-size="12" fill="#1a202c">Date: October 2023</text>
  
  <!-- Building Elevation -->
  <!-- Ground Level -->
  <rect x="50" y="450" width="700" height="50" fill="#f7fafc" stroke="#2d3748" />
  <text x="60" y="480" font-family="Arial" font-size="12" fill="#1a202c">Ground Level: 9-10 ft</text>
  
  <!-- Level 1 -->
  <rect x="50" y="350" width="700" height="100" fill="#f7fafc" stroke="#2d3748" />
  <text x="60" y="380" font-family="Arial" font-size="12" fill="#1a202c">Level 1: Living Spaces</text>
  <line x1="50" y1="400" x2="100" y2="400" stroke="#a0aec0" stroke-width="2" />
  <text x="60" y="395" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="#1a202c">Kitchen</text>
  <line x1="150" y1="400" x2="200" y2="400" stroke="#a0aec0" stroke-width="2" />
  <text x="160" y="395" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="#1a202c">Bar</text>
  
  <!-- Level 2 -->
  <rect x="50" y="250" width="700" height="100" fill="#f7fafc" stroke="#2d3748" />
  <text x="60" y="280" font-family="Arial" font-size="12" fill="#1a202c">Level 2: Master Suite & Rooms</text>
  <line x1="50" y1="300" x2="100" y2="300" stroke="#a0aec0" stroke-width="2" />
  <text x="60" y="295" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="#1a202c">Master Bedroom</text>
  
  <!-- Level 3 -->
  <rect x="50" y="150" width="700" height="100" fill="#f7fafc" stroke="#2d3748" />
  <text x="60" y="180" font-family="Arial" font-size="12" fill="#1a202c">Level 3: Master Suite & Rooms</text>
  <line x1="50" y1="200" x2="100" y2="200" stroke="#a0aec0" stroke-width="2" />
  <text x="60" y="195" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="#1a202c">Master Bedroom</text>
  
  <!-- Roof -->
  <polygon points="50,150 400,50 750,150" fill="#f7fafc" stroke="#2d3748" />
  
  <!-- Pool Area -->
  <rect x="600" y="450" width="100" height="50" fill="#a0aec0" stroke="#2d3748" />
  <text x="610" y="475" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="#1a202c">Pool Area</text>
  
  <!-- North Arrow -->
  <line x1="750" y1="50" x2="750" y2="20" stroke="#2d3748" stroke-width="2" />
  <line x1="745" y1="25" x2="750" y2="15" stroke="#2d3748" stroke-width="2" />
  <line x1="755" y1="25" x2="750" y2="15" stroke="#2d3748" stroke-width="2" />
  <text x="740" y="60" font-family="Arial" font-size="12" fill="#1a202c">N</text>
</svg>
